message.easynpc.access.no_permission: You don't have permission to edit this NPC.
message.easynpc.access.npc_not_found: This NPC could not be found or no longer exists.
text.easy_npc.armourers_workshop.no_supp: The skin model %1$s for %2$s is not official supported with Armourer's Workshop yet! Please use the official recommended skin models like the humanoid model instead.
text.easy_npc.invalid_remote_image:
The remote image is invalid or not accessible!
Pleas check the URL and try again.
text.easy_npc.item.custom_data_test: Right click to verify custom item data.
text.easy_npc.item.easy_npc_preset: ► Right click on empty place to spawn the NPC.
text.easy_npc.item.easy_npc_preset_empty: ► Right click on an NPC to save their settings as a new preset.
text.easy_npc.item.move_easy_npc: Select the EasyNPC with the right mouse button and move it with the left mouse button to the targeted position.
text.easy_npc.trading.busy:
%1$s is currently busy with another trade with %2$s.
 Please wait until the trade is finished.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.allay: A cheerful little helper that dances to music and collects items. Surprisingly reliable for someone with no pockets.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.bogged: A skeleton soaked in swamp water. Slower, mushier, and slightly smellier.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.cat: Independent, judgmental, and oddly calming. Will ignore your commands unless it feels like it.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.cave_spider: Smaller than a spider, twice the attitude. Perfect for tight spaces and tense dialogues.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.chicken: Clucks a lot, thinks a little. Perfect for low-key NPCs with simple tasks.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.cobblemon_npc: A Cobblemon-based NPC that can take the form of any Cobblemon species. Gotta quest 'em all.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.creeper: Surprisingly talkative for someone who usually just explodes. Handle with care.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.doppler: A shape-shifting NPC that can adopt any entity model. Is it a bird? A zombie? It's whatever you need it to be.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.drowned: Rose from the depths with a lot to say. Waterproof and surprisingly articulate.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.enderman: Tall, dark, and mysterious. Avoids eye contact at all costs - unless provoked.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.evoker: A spellcaster with strong opinions and a tendency to summon things uninvited.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.fairy: A tiny magical being with big energy. May or may not grant wishes.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.fox: Cunning, quick, and utterly untrustworthy with berries. Excellent NPC material.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.ghast: A large, floating, deeply emotional mob. Don't ask how it got in here.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.horse: Noble. Swift. Slightly judgy. Will carry your quests with dignity.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.humanoid: Looks human. Walks human. Talks human. Close enough.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.humanoid_slim: Like a humanoid, but with better posture and a narrower silhouette.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.husk: A desert-hardened zombie that forgot to hydrate. Still has things to say.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.illusioner: Creates copies, bends reality, and still shows up to work. Impressive.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.iron_golem: Built for protection, repurposed for conversation. Surprisingly gentle once you get to know it.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.orc: Sturdy, loud, and surprisingly good at negotiations. Mostly about strength.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.orc_warrior: Battle-hardened and proud. Has a lot of opinions about the concept of honor.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.pig: Round, pink, and full of personality. A classic NPC choice for humble roles.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.piglin: Loves gold. Will trade for gold. Do not touch the gold.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.piglin_brute: Has no interest in your gold - only in making you leave. Immediately.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.pillager: Professional raider with a crossbow and an attitude. Now taking quests.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.skeleton: Bony, bow-wielding, and strangely philosophical at night.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.skeleton_hors: A horse that survived death and kept on galloping. Spooky but reliable.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.slime: Green, squishy, and oddly optimistic. Bounces back from everything - literally.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.spider: Eight eyes, eight legs, one agenda. Surprisingly useful when not on the ceiling.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.stray: An icy skeleton from the tundra. Cold outside, cold inside, cold conversation.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.vex: Small, angry, and phasing through walls. Somehow still finds time to chat.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.villager: The backbone of any NPC village. Trades hard, complains harder.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.vindicator: An axe-wielding enforcer with a strict moral code - mostly involving axes.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.witch: Brews potions, cackles occasionally, and always has exactly what you need - for a price.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.wither_skelet: Forged in the Nether, talks in riddles. Carries a sword and a lot of unresolved feelings.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.wolf: Loyal, fierce, and the best NPC companion money can't buy.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.zombie: Shuffles, groans, and occasionally has something important to say. Mostly shuffles.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.zombie_horse: Undead, smelly, and still faster than walking. A zombie's best friend.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.zombie_villag: A villager going through a rough patch. With patience, they can be cured - or just given a quest.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawn_egg.zombified_pig: Caught between two worlds and annoyed about it. Don't provoke the family.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawner.boss_spawner: The Boss Spawner is a special spawner that allows you to spawn a boss NPC.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawner.default_spawner: The Default Spawner is a spawner that allows you to spawn a default NPC.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawner.group_spawner: The Group Spawner is a spawner that allows you to spawn a group of NPCs.
tooltip.easy_npc.spawner.single_spawner: The Single Spawner is a spawner that allows you to spawn a single NPC.
